[cron:0f65bca4-8d31-40d6-8d98-d1f8e1a97258 HB Trading 30m] HB Trading 30m
Current time: Saturday, February 28th, 2026 — 12:30 (Europe/Madrid)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Understood. Here is the summary for the HB Trading 30m routine:

Today is Saturday, February 28th, 2026 at 12:30 in the Europe/Madrid time zone. This is the scheduled 30-minute heartbeat check-in for the HB Trading agent.

The main tasks for this heartbeat are:

1. Review recent memory logs in /Users/FIRMAS/.openclaw/workspace/memory/ and update the agent's long-term memory file at /Users/FIRMAS/.openclaw/workspace/MEMORY.md.
2. Perform a quick self-assessment - check for any errors, review recent decisions, and make note of any lessons learned or improvements to be made.
3. Ensure all tools and system dependencies are functioning properly.
4. Optionally, send a brief status update to the user (FIRMAS) via the default communication channel.

This heartbeat helps the HB Trading agent stay aligned, learn from experience, and provide reliable, up-to-date service. Please let me know if you need anything else!
